post.description: Create a pending job and launch the pipeline in the background.

get.description: Recent audits for a domain — used by the compare UI to pick a baseline.

schema.title: Response List By Domain Audit By Domain Get

parameters.name: against

schema.description: Baseline audit id. If omitted, the previous audit on the same domain is used automatically.
schema.title: Against

parameters.description: Baseline audit id. If omitted, the previous audit on the same domain is used automatically.

schema.title: Response List Recent Audit Recent Get
Response List Archived Audit Archived Get

get.description: Live progress lines for a running audit (in-memory, process-local).

schema.title: Response Get Audit Logs Audit  Audit Id  Logs Get

post.description: Fallback: render a PDF from an AuditResult posted in the body (no store).

schema.title: Response List Briefs Content Brief Get
Response List Checks Ai Visibility Get

get.description: Consolidated CSV: one row per URL with global score and key counts.

schema.title: Response List Watches Sitemap Watcher Get
Response List Monitors Perf Monitor Get
Response List Campaigns Seo Tracker Get
Response Trigger Scheduler Trigger  Job Id  Post

get.description: Tell the frontend whether a password is required at all.

schema.title: Response Auth Status Auth Status Get

get.description: 200 if creds OK, 401 otherwise. Used by the login screen / token checks.

schema.title: Response Auth Verify Auth Verify Get

post.description:
Exchange the shared password for an opaque session token.

Body: {"password": "..."}. On success returns {"token", "expiresIn"} so
the client can store the token instead of the raw password.

schema.title: Response Auth Token Auth Token Post
Response Auth Logout Auth Logout Post

AccessibilityAudit.title: AccessibilityAudit
AccessibilityAudit.description:
WCAG audit — static signals aggregated across pages + an optional LLM
verdict on a few key pages.

AgencyBranding.title: AgencyBranding
AgencyBranding.description:
Identity of the agency displayed on generated reports.

`logoUrl` is either a data URL (frontend preview) or a relative path
served by the backend (/settings/branding/logo) once uploaded.

AiCitation.title: AiCitation
AiCitation.description: One source cited by an AI engine when answering a query.

AiQueryResult.title: AiQueryResult
AiQueryResult.description: Result of probing one query against one AI engine.

AiVisibilityCheck.title: AiVisibilityCheck
AiVisibilityCheck.description: A check job — target site + queries + per-query probe results.

AiVisibilityReport.title: AiVisibilityReport
AiVisibilityReport.description: LLM-produced synthesis once all probes are done.

AuditJobDetail.title: AuditJobDetail
AuditJobDetail.description: Full detail returned by GET /audit/{id} — handles all statuses.

AuditJobSummary.title: AuditJobSummary
AuditJobSummary.description: Lightweight view of an audit — used in lists/sidebar.

CompetitorBattle.title: CompetitorBattle
CompetitorBattle.description: A comparison between one target site and N competitors.

CompetitorReport.title: CompetitorReport
CompetitorReport.description: LLM-produced synthesis across all sites in a battle.

CompetitorSite.title: CompetitorSite
CompetitorSite.description: One competitor inside a battle: URL + pointer to its underlying audit.

ContentBrief.title: ContentBrief
ContentBrief.description: A brief job — request + status + serp data + result.

ContentBriefOutline.title: ContentBriefOutline
ContentBriefOutline.description: A proposed H2 with optional H3 bullets and intent description.

ContentBriefResult.title: ContentBriefResult
ContentBriefResult.description: LLM-produced editorial brief from the SERP analysis.

CrawlCoverage.title: CrawlCoverage
CrawlCoverage.description:
How much of the site the crawl covered vs what was asked, and how many
pages the LLM analysed in detail.

CulturalAuditSummary-Input.title: CulturalAuditSummary
CulturalAuditSummary-Input.description:
Cultural adaptation audit for multilingual sites. Empty/absent when the
site appears monolingual.

CulturalAuditSummary-Output.title: CulturalAuditSummary
CulturalAuditSummary-Output.description:
Cultural adaptation audit for multilingual sites. Empty/absent when the
site appears monolingual.

DetectedTech.title: DetectedTech
DetectedTech.description: A single technology spotted on the prospect's site.

GeoAuditSummary.title: GeoAuditSummary
GeoAuditSummary.description:
GEO (AI-citability) audit. Page scores + site-level robots/llms.txt +
a real "would AI cite this site?" test on plausible intent queries.

GeoQueryVerdict.title: GeoQueryVerdict
GeoQueryVerdict.description:
One plausible search query and whether the site would likely be cited
by AI assistants on it.

KeywordReading.title: KeywordReading
KeywordReading.description: One position check for one keyword at a point in time.

PageTechnical.title: PageTechnical
PageTechnical.description: Crawl-derived on-page facts merged into a PageAnalysis by the runner.

PerformanceMetric.title: PerformanceMetric
PerformanceMetric.description: One Core Web Vital with real + lab values when available.

PerformanceSnapshot.title: PerformanceSnapshot
PerformanceSnapshot.description: Result of a PageSpeed Insights call on a URL.

ProgrammaticAuditSummary.title: ProgrammaticAuditSummary
ProgrammaticAuditSummary.description: Quality gates for templated/programmatic page sets.

ProspectCompanyIdentity.title: ProspectCompanyIdentity
ProspectCompanyIdentity.description: Who the company is — guessed from the site + light web search.

ProspectContact.title: ProspectContact
ProspectContact.description:
A named person at the prospect (from the site or public sources).

Strict rule enforced via the prompt: an email/phone is only filled when the
source explicitly attributes it to *this* person; `sourceUrl` is mandatory
whenever any coordinate (email/phone) or a non-obvious role is given.

ProspectParentCompany.title: ProspectParentCompany
ProspectParentCompany.description: A parent company / group the prospect belongs to, with the link and its people.

ProspectParentContact.title: ProspectParentContact
ProspectParentContact.description: A named person at the parent company / group (a leader or a contact).

ProspectPersona.title: ProspectPersona
ProspectPersona.description: Likely decision-maker + tailored prospecting angles + real contacts.

ProspectSheet.title: ProspectSheet
ProspectSheet.description: A prospecting sheet job — request + status + result.

ProspectStackByCategory.title: ProspectStackByCategory
ProspectStackByCategory.description: Detected tech stack, grouped by category.

ResponsiveAudit.title: ResponsiveAudit
ResponsiveAudit.description:
Responsive / mobile audit — static signals + Playwright rendering at
375 / 768 / 1280 px on a few key pages.

SerpResult.title: SerpResult
SerpResult.description: One organic result inspected during the brief generation.

note.title: Note
note.default: Vérifie que le TYPE de page (fiche produit, comparatif, blog, service…) correspond à ce que Google récompense pour la requête. Évaluation IA + recherche web sur un échantillon de pages.

SxoAuditSummary.title: SxoAuditSummary
SxoAuditSummary.description: Search Experience Optimization — page-type vs SERP-intent mismatch.

TechnicalCrawlSummary.title: TechnicalCrawlSummary
TechnicalCrawlSummary.description: Site-wide aggregates over the technical crawl, plus the per-page rows.

TechnicalPageRow.title: TechnicalPageRow
TechnicalPageRow.description: One row of the Screaming-Frog-style crawl table.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.default: Estimations indicatives produites par IA + recherche web. Ce ne sont PAS des données de clickstream type SEMrush/Ahrefs.

VisibilityEstimate.title: VisibilityEstimate
VisibilityEstimate.description:
LLM-estimated organic visibility. Every number is an order-of-magnitude
guess from public signals, NOT measured data.
